articles.title: Sports media: Mike Breen speaks up for regional networks, who don’t air first-round NBA playoff games under new deal
articles.description:
Every round of the NBA playoffs will be nationally televised, leaving no room for local broadcasters on the call.

The post Sports media: Mike Breen speaks up for regional networks, who don’t air first-round NBA playoff games under new deal appeared first on Boston.com.
